underlying_goal: Add the 😤 (triumph) emoji to their Hyprland keybindings configuration
friction_detail: Claude failed to locate the keybinds file twice (user had to interrupt and provide the path), then when asked to edit, failed again; user resorted to doing it themselves and Claude only offered key suggestions.
brief_summary: User wanted to add a triumph emoji keybind to their Hyprland config; Claude couldn't find the file and the user gave up on Claude editing it, though Claude did suggest useful key options.
